results.title: The Future of Agentic AI: Inside Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 ...
results.snippet: The era of experimental AI "chatbots" is officially evolving into the era of production-ready "Agentic Workflows." With the release of Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0, developers now have a unified, enterprise-grade SDK for both .NET and Python that bridges the gap between research-level orchestration and real-world stability. Whether you are migrating from Semantic Kernel or building a multi ...

results.title: Microsoft Ships Production-Ready Agent Framework 1.0 for .NET and ...
results.snippet: Microsoft has released version 1.0 of Microsoft Agent Framework , marking what the company calls the production-ready milestone for its open-source SDK and runtime for building AI agents and multi- agent workflows. The release is available for both .NET and Python, with Microsoft describing it as the stable release with long-term support.
